<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Termwind\Exceptions; use InvalidArgumentException; /** * @internal */ final class StyleNotFound extends InvalidArgumentException { /** * Creates a new style not found instance. */ private function __construct(string $message) { parent::__construct($message, 0, $this->getPrevious()); } /** * Creates a new style not found instance from the given style. */ public static function fromStyle(string $style): self { return new self(sprintf('Style [%s] not found.', $style)); } }
